title: Wisps Create Hardcore
description: a hardcore modpack focused on create with multiplayer functionality.
body:
this modpack is made for create hardcore, and it has multiplayer functionality like hardcore revive, but its main focus is create.
it adds many popular addons to create, like Enchantment Industry, and Crafts and Additions, it has much more to offer as well, even some cursed mods like curvy pipes, it boost's the normal hardcore experience andding even more to find, and do, like fly around with the biplane from immersive aircrafts, or build masive tunnel bores with the create mod and its addons, or even lower the risk of your hardcore world by playing with friends with hardcore revival.
this will be updated as fast as i can as i am only a single person. **NOTE: **this modpack can be used for servers and is ment for servers but does suport singleplayer as well.  
as always have fun playing.

join my discord [Here](https://discord.gg/ET6g7wYhae)
